description: Agent Souq — full unattended production deployment (Docker, Nginx, HTTPS, DB, health checks).

Domain.description: Domain/subdomain already pointing (A record) at this instance's public IP

LetsEncryptEmail.description: Email for Let's Encrypt registration/expiry notices

RepoUrl.description: Git URL of the GitHub repo (https://github.com/moha700m/New-sala.git)

runCommand: apt-get update -y && apt-get upgrade -y && apt-get autoremove -y
apt-get install -y docker-compose-plugin git nginx certbot python3-certbot-nginx ufw fail2ban unattended-upgrades openssl host
command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 || (curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs build-essential python3)
echo '== Step 16: swap for small instances =='
if ! swapon --show | grep -q '/swapfile'; then fallocate -l 2G /swapfile && chmod 600 /swapfile && mkswap /swapfile && swapon /swapfile && echo '/swapfile none swap sw 0 0' >> /etc/fstab; fi
if [ -z "$REPO" ]; then echo 'ERROR: RepoUrl is required. Pass your GitHub repo URL.'; exit 1; fi
if [ ! -f "$APP_DIR/server.js" ]; then echo 'ERROR: backend/server.js not found in the cloned repo at '$APP_DIR; exit 1; fi
echo '== Step 6: env vars (generate secrets, keep real Moyasar keys you set) =='
if [ ! -f .env ]; then echo 'ERROR: .env missing. Upload it via Parameter Store / S3 first (see RUNBOOK-SSM.md) — never bake secret keys into the SSM document.'; exit 1; fi
if grep -q 'YOUR_MOYASAR_SECRET_KEY_HERE' .env; then echo 'ERROR: .env still has placeholder Moyasar keys.'; exit 1; fi
echo '== Step 11: HTTPS via Let\'s Encrypt =='

if host "$DOMAIN" >/dev/null 2>&1; then certbot --nginx -d "$DOMAIN" -m "$EMAIL" --agree-tos --redirect -n || echo 'certbot failed — check DNS'; else echo 'DNS for '$DOMAIN' not resolving yet; skipping certbot. Re-run after A record points here.'; fi
ufw allow OpenSSH && ufw allow 'Nginx Full' && ufw --force enable
curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:4000/health && echo ' <- local health OK' || (echo 'LOCAL HEALTH FAILED'; docker compose logs --tail=50)
curl -fsS -H "x-admin-key: $ADMIN_KEY" http://127.0.0.1:4000/api/admin/payments >/dev/null && echo 'DB endpoint OK' || echo 'DB endpoint check failed'
curl -fsS https://$DOMAIN/health >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'PUBLIC HTTPS OK' || echo 'Public HTTPS not verified (DNS/cert pending)'
apt-get autoremove -y && apt-get clean && docker image prune -f
